title: Makefile: fix dependencies for buildah
body:
add *.go files under vendor/ to the list of dependencies for buildah.

I've noticed that make didn't trigger a build after editing some files under vendor.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: I am not crazy about doing this, since it slows everyones compiles down, for little benefit, since the vendor directory should change seldom.
Ditto @rhatdan's thought.  FWIW., what I've done is made a change in vendor, then just a small change somewhere in the "real" buildah files to make it compile.
thanks, I am going to close this
